verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everything that touches Your hand It is beyond beautiful Everything that You love There is life and there is joy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And You love me More than love me And I couldn’t ask for more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your love has changed me Lord Your love made me whole I am grateful I lift my hands and worship You Your word has changed me Lord Your word made me see That You’re beyond beautiful I praise You Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hands raised high Voices singing, with my everything My heart explodes, You are exposed Because You’re the very meaning
